import re
targets = {
    "urllib3": "2.7.0",
    "idna": "3.18",
    "cryptography": "49.0.0",
    "flask": "3.1.3",
    "werkzeug": "3.1.6",
    "mako": "1.3.12",
    "pillow": "12.2.0",
    "pydantic": "1.10.26",
    "pymysql": "1.2.0",
    "python-dotenv": "1.2.2",
    "requests": "2.34.2",
}
path = "/tmp/req_experiment.txt"
lines = open(path).read().splitlines()
out = []
for line in lines:
    m = re.match(r'^([A-Za-z0-9_.\-\[\]]+)==([0-9A-Za-z.\-]+)', line)
    if m:
        name = m.group(1)
        basename = re.sub(r'\[.*\]', '', name).lower()
        if basename in targets:
            rest = line[m.end():]
            newline = f"{name}=={targets[basename]}{rest}"
            out.append(newline)
            continue
    out.append(line)
open(path, "w").write("\n".join(out) + "\n")
EOF
grep -iE "urllib3|idna|cryptography|^flask==|werkzeug|mako|pillow|pydantic|pymysql|python-dotenv|^requests==" /tmp/req_experiment.txt

domain = self.get_cookie_domain(app)
        path = self.get_cookie_path(app)

        if not session:
            if session.modified:
                cache.delete(self.key_prefix + session.sid)
                response.delete_cookie(
                    app.session_cookie_name, domain=domain, path=path
                )
            return

        if session.modified:
            httponly = self.get_cookie_httponly(app)
            secure = self.get_cookie_secure(app)
            expires = self.get_expiration_time(app, session)
            samesite = self.get_cookie_samesite(app)
            val = self.serializer.dumps(dict(session))

            if session.sid is None:
                session.sid = self._generate_sid()

            cache.set(
                key=self.key_prefix + session.sid,
                value=val,
                timeout=total_seconds(app.permanent_session_lifetime),
            )

            if self.use_signer:
                session_id = sign(want_bytes(session.sid))
